topSelling.name: HP PRINTER DESKJET 2320
topSelling.description: A compact and affordable all‑in‑one printer that lets you print, scan, and copy everyday documents and photos. The product operates effectively as a home solution which provides users with simple USB installation.
topSelling.fullDescription:
• Functions: Print, Scan, Copy
• Print Technology: HP Thermal Inkjet.
• Print Speed: Up to 7.5 ppm (black) and 5.5 ppm (color) ISO; draft speeds up to 20 ppm black / 16 ppm color.
• Print Resolution: Up to 1200 × 1200 dpi (black) and 4800 × 1200 optimized dpi (color).
• Scanner: Flatbed scanner up to 1200 dpi optical resolution.
• Copy Speed: Up to 6 cpm (black) and 3 cpm (color).
• Copy Quality: Up to 600 × 300 dpi (black & color).
• Connectivity: Hi‑Speed USB 2.0 (no wireless).
• Duplex Printing: Manual (driver‑supported only).
• Paper Handling: Input Tray: 60 sheets, Output Tray: 25 sheets, 
• Supported Sizes: A4, B5, A6, DL envelope.
• Monthly Duty Cycle: Up to 1,000 pages; recommended monthly volume 50–100 pages.
• Cartridge Configuration: 2 cartridges (black + tri‑color)
• Compatible OS: Windows (7, 10, 11) and macOS (10.12 and above).
• Dimensions: 425.2 × 304.1 × 149.1 mm
• Weight: 3.42 kg (printer).
• Best for: Everyday browsing, social media use, video streaming, messaging, and long battery endurance.

topSelling.name: BINATONE STABILIZER DVS -2000
topSelling.description: Protect your valuable electronics from power fluctuations with the BINATONE STABILIZER DVS -2000.
topSelling.fullDescription:
Protect your valuable electronics from power fluctuations with the BINATONE STABILIZER DVS -2000. Designed with advanced CPU control circuitry, this 2000VA stabilizer ensures accurate output regulation and full protection against high voltage, low voltage, short circuits, and overheating. Ideal for TVs, home theaters, and refrigerators up to 300L, it features a 110V socket for international appliances and a USB port for charging mobile devices. With selectable delay modes and a sleek, compact design, the DVS-2000 delivers peace of mind and reliable performance for your home or office.

    Output Regulation: Accurate and stable Sockets:
      110V socket for compatible appliances USB port for charging phones and power banks

    Design: Compact, durable housing
